zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Wingfield於1466年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆時，她的父親Sir John Wingfield36歲，母親Elizabeth FitzLewis30歲。她和William de Howlett至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1525年在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 文哈姆享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Wingfield was born in 1466, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Wingfield, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth FitzLewis, was 30. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with William de Howlett. She died in 1525, in Little Wenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Wingfield est née en 1466, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Wingfield, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzLewis, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec William de Howlett. Elle est décédée en 1525, à Little Wenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Wingfield(이)가 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레더잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Wingfield(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzLewis(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 William de Howlett(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 웬함에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Wingfield родилась в 1466 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Wingfield было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzLewis, 30.
